headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on LyondellBasell Industries, Lowers Price Target to $67
summary: Citigroup  analyst Patrick Cunningham   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $80 to $67.

headline: LyondellBasell Industries (LYB): A High UK Dividend Stock Capitalizing on Higher Polyethylene Prices
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) is one of the UK’s highest-dividend stocks. The company pays a quarterly dividend of $0.69 per share, translating to a dividend yield of about 6.86%. On May 22, LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) declared a $0.69-per-share dividend, paid on June 8. On May 28, Wells Fargo upgraded the stock to Overweight from Equal Weight […]

headline: Here's What Makes Nucor Stock a Solid Investment Option Now
summary: NUE has surged 46.9% YTD as rising earnings estimates, capacity expansions, acquisitions and higher steel prices support growth prospects.
